{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014513A5E61514AB7ABAA035D3"}"},"total":4935},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7428480116122567486","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个五星是为第一个世界打的嘞，感觉第一个世界最好看[快哭了]

为什么这里面这个题材我能看完别的书的题材看不完呢？好好奇啊，感觉这本书和别的书有个区别，大概就是没有非常细致的描绘，没有太多废话吧，把很多基本的写出来了，然后加一点细节，然后你不会看的好像很快，但又不会觉得好像很水或者什么
作者因为别人说太长了，就很多都缩短了，好可惜，我觉得那些还可以继续往下写，可以另起一本书啦，没看够"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729583712,"group_id":"7184388421987601443","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"552387705317920"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184388421987601443","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"154"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10453,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7426631132732588862","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉主角身为系统，每绑定一个数组所在的那个世界都可以单独拿出来成为一本书，真的我居然很耐心的看下去了，好看嘞节奏那些的都把握的挺好的，细节也写的挺好的（主角的戏份至少第一个世界比较少，但是我觉得很好看啊，可能是因为作者也没有给主角描绘的太多吧，反正我觉得我一直都没有忘记主角是谁，可是同时我又可以沉浸于那一个宿主所展现的故事里面）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729153844,"group_id":"7184388421987601443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看到请催我去学习（曾用名余嘉木二代）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzEYiCL1OOa+Ktx/XnTt5Ww=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c9502a51e74145f18396669effab00ef~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701770&x-signature=7n9PVzG8sCTM%2BjfNzm4QYYZjwdM%3D","user_id":"552387705317920","user_name":"邶冷安二代"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"552387705317920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184388421987601443","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名《开局成为系统，掠夺诸天万界》、《宿主请留步，你挂掉地上了》。
系统三大准则:
一、诸天本源总量保持不变，晋升是系统唯一法则。
二、系统之间相互吸引相互竞争，以掠夺为己任，任何的善意会让自己成为他人的本源。
三、诸天万界如同黑暗森林，请隐藏好自己，不要让同类发现。
穿越成系统的叶宇看着三条莫名熟悉的准则陷入沉思。
看着自己系统功能居然是规则类系统功能——掠夺！一个不成熟的想法在心中酝酿……
万物增幅？拿来吧你！
签到功能？拿来吧你！
复制功能？拿来吧你！
聊天群……主神空间……无敌领域……等等
经过无限掠夺后的叶宇看着自身数不清的系统功能露出微笑。
我说我是诸天最强金手指不过分吧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1f3462caf90a6e677fea1f18438fe86d","author":"风无声","author_id":"","book_id":"7184388421987601443","book_name":"我就掠夺些系统，你们都慌啥？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7184388538937377320","read_count":"29961","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000158"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"471","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,诸天万界,聊天群,架空,开局,东方玄幻,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/04b9510b2323120e4328ed71ba6f98ef~t plv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779299113&x-signature=chD9A2ChGsfyBVtLklUyGOg17nM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1271494409985127","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.770023e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014513A5E61514AB7ABAA035D3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3769,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":34057},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7217776559549285154","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相当的精彩，此书为群像书籍，主角占比不大，每一个人都有其精气神，科技与玄幻，魔法，修仙的一次碰撞，文明与文明间的博弈，宏大的战斗场面，科技的狂欢盛宴，魔法的至高殿堂，二向箔，黑洞拟定，神芯，量子之海，量子幽灵，氦闪，光粒打击，水滴，法师塔，两个系统间的博弈如同两个巨人在这片广袤的星域落子，其他人只能在这种高压环境下夹缝求生，瑟瑟发抖，弱者将在黑暗森林的法则里被无情吞噬，强者将踩着他们的尸体坐上那至高的王座！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680519626,"group_id":"7184388421987601443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"雁将秋色去，帆带好山移","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzdmX5G1sORfHFCCmUHFjJJlsM0OCGAO5EyHFeIb+whx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bc8ed27a50a74e13959f413f0ab7ddc4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709699&x-signature=jFfnvHo5hBvLrCGJYXpoHUR8jfI%3D","user_id":"3817941736359495","user_name":"鉴书如观镜自照"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3817941736359495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184388421987601443","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名《开局成为系统，掠夺诸天万界》、《宿主请留步，你挂掉
